blended.narrative: Whiteface is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,466 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
